Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Class OptimizerOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.OptimizerOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
OptimizerOptions
public static final class OptimizerOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for OptimizerOptions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning(boolean value)
    Whether to allow symmetric joins without pruning.
    OptimizerOptions
    build()
    Builds the OptimizerOptions.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    defaultFilterSelectivity(int value)
    Default filter selectivity percentage (0-100).
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
    Whether to enable aggregate dynamic filter pushdown.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit(boolean value)
    Whether to enable the distinct aggregation soft limit optimization.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
    Whether to enable dynamic filter pushdown.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
    Whether to enable join dynamic filter pushdown.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableLeafExpressionPushdown(boolean value)
    When set to true, the optimizer extracts leaf expressions (such as get_field) from filter/sort/join nodes into projections closer to the leaf table scans, and pushes those projections down toward the leaf nodes.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enablePiecewiseMergeJoin(boolean value)
    Whether to enable piecewise merge join.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableRoundRobinRepartition(boolean value)
    Whether to use round-robin repartitioning.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableSortPushdown(boolean value)
    Whether to enable sort pushdown optimization.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableTopkAggregation(boolean value)
    Whether to enable top-K aggregation optimization.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
    Whether to enable top-K dynamic filter pushdown.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    enableWindowLimits(boolean value)
    Whether to enable window function limit optimizations.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    expandViewsAtOutput(boolean value)
    Whether to expand views at the output level.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    filterNullJoinKeys(boolean value)
    Whether to filter null join keys during planning.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues(int value)
    Maximum number of distinct values for hash join in-list pushdown.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize(long value)
    Maximum in-list size for hash join pushdown (in bytes).
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold(long value)
    Threshold (in bytes) for using a single partition in hash joins.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows(long value)
    Threshold (in rows) for using a single partition in hash joins.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    maxPasses(int value)
    Maximum number of optimizer passes.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    preferExistingSort(boolean value)
    Whether to prefer existing sort order.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    preferExistingUnion(boolean value)
    Whether to prefer existing union ordering.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    preferHashJoin(boolean value)
    Whether to prefer hash joins over sort-merge joins.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    preserveFilePartitions(int value)
    Number of file partitions to preserve.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionAggregations(boolean value)
    Whether to repartition aggregation inputs.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionFileMinSize(long value)
    Minimum file size (in bytes) for file repartitioning.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionFileScans(boolean value)
    Whether to repartition file scans.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionJoins(boolean value)
    Whether to repartition join inputs.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionSorts(boolean value)
    Whether to repartition sort inputs.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    repartitionWindows(boolean value)
    Whether to repartition window function inputs.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    skipFailedRules(boolean value)
    Whether to skip failed optimizer rules instead of erroring.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    subsetRepartitionThreshold(int value)
    Subset repartition threshold.
    OptimizerOptions.Builder
    topDownJoinKeyReordering(boolean value)
    Whether to use top-down join key reordering.

  • Method Details

    • enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableDistinctAggregationSoftLimit(boolean value)
      Whether to enable the distinct aggregation soft limit optimization.

    • enableRoundRobinRepartition

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableRoundRobinRepartition(boolean value)
      Whether to use round-robin repartitioning. Default is true.

    • enableTopkAggregation

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableTopkAggregation(boolean value)
      Whether to enable top-K aggregation optimization. Default is true.

    • enableWindowLimits

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableWindowLimits(boolean value)
      Whether to enable window function limit optimizations.

    • enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableTopkDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
      Whether to enable top-K dynamic filter pushdown.

    • enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableJoinDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
      Whether to enable join dynamic filter pushdown.

    • enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableAggregateDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
      Whether to enable aggregate dynamic filter pushdown.

    • enableDynamicFilterPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableDynamicFilterPushdown(boolean value)
      Whether to enable dynamic filter pushdown.

    • filterNullJoinKeys

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder filterNullJoinKeys(boolean value)
      Whether to filter null join keys during planning. Default is true.

    • repartitionAggregations

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionAggregations(boolean value)
      Whether to repartition aggregation inputs. Default is true.

    • repartitionFileMinSize

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionFileMinSize(long value)
      Minimum file size (in bytes) for file repartitioning.

    • repartitionJoins

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionJoins(boolean value)
      Whether to repartition join inputs. Default is true.

    • allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder allowSymmetricJoinsWithoutPruning(boolean value)
      Whether to allow symmetric joins without pruning.

    • repartitionFileScans

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionFileScans(boolean value)
      Whether to repartition file scans. Default is true.

    • preserveFilePartitions

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder preserveFilePartitions(int value)
      Number of file partitions to preserve.

    • repartitionWindows

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionWindows(boolean value)
      Whether to repartition window function inputs. Default is true.

    • repartitionSorts

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder repartitionSorts(boolean value)
      Whether to repartition sort inputs. Default is true.

    • subsetRepartitionThreshold

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder subsetRepartitionThreshold(int value)
      Subset repartition threshold.

    • preferExistingSort

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder preferExistingSort(boolean value)
      Whether to prefer existing sort order.

    • skipFailedRules

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder skipFailedRules(boolean value)
      Whether to skip failed optimizer rules instead of erroring. Default is true.

    • maxPasses

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder maxPasses(int value)
      Maximum number of optimizer passes. Default is 3.

    • topDownJoinKeyReordering

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder topDownJoinKeyReordering(boolean value)
      Whether to use top-down join key reordering. Default is true.

    • preferHashJoin

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder preferHashJoin(boolean value)
      Whether to prefer hash joins over sort-merge joins. Default is true.

    • enablePiecewiseMergeJoin

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enablePiecewiseMergeJoin(boolean value)
      Whether to enable piecewise merge join.

    • hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder hashJoinSinglePartitionThreshold(long value)
      Threshold (in bytes) for using a single partition in hash joins.

    • hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder hashJoinSinglePartitionThresholdRows(long value)
      Threshold (in rows) for using a single partition in hash joins.

    • hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxSize(long value)
      Maximum in-list size for hash join pushdown (in bytes).

    • hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder hashJoinInlistPushdownMaxDistinctValues(int value)
      Maximum number of distinct values for hash join in-list pushdown.

    • defaultFilterSelectivity

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder defaultFilterSelectivity(int value)
      Default filter selectivity percentage (0-100). Default is 20.

    • preferExistingUnion

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder preferExistingUnion(boolean value)
      Whether to prefer existing union ordering.

    • expandViewsAtOutput

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder expandViewsAtOutput(boolean value)
      Whether to expand views at the output level.

    • enableSortPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableSortPushdown(boolean value)
      Whether to enable sort pushdown optimization.

    • enableLeafExpressionPushdown

      public OptimizerOptions.Builder enableLeafExpressionPushdown(boolean value)
      When set to true, the optimizer extracts leaf expressions (such as get_field) from filter/sort/join nodes into projections closer to the leaf table scans, and pushes those projections down toward the leaf nodes.

    • build

      public OptimizerOptions build()
      Builds the OptimizerOptions.
